parameters.name: force
parameters.description: If true, the dashboard will be re-initialized even if it has been initialized before.

get.description: Get the configuration data for Grafana dashboard. The data source UID is required to generate the configuration.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Available types: MAIN/AI/LOG Default: MAIN

parameters.name: dataSourceUid
parameters.description: The UID of data source set in Grafana for the dashboard

caseSensitive.description: Whether to match the value case-sensitively

domains.description: Domains that the route applies to. If empty, the route applies to all domains.

items.description: Domains that the route applies to. If empty, the route applies to all domains.

upstreams.description: Fallback upstreams. Only one upstream is allowed when fallbackStrategy is SEQ.

pageNum.description: Page number, starting from 1. If omitted, all items will be returned.

pageSize.description: Number of items per page. If omitted, all items will be returned.

CommonPageQuery.description: Query criteria for generic entity listing with pagination support.

enabled.description: Whether to enable the header control feature.

key.description: Credential Key. Required when source is HEADER or QUERY

caseSensitive.description: Whether to match the value case-sensitively

tokens.description: Tokens used to request the provider

items.description: Tokens used to request the provider

additionalProperties.description: Raw configuration key-value pairs used by ai-proxy plugin

rawConfigs.description: Raw configuration key-value pairs used by ai-proxy plugin

autoLogin.description: Whether to automatically log in when opening a new browser window.

domains.description: Domains that the mcp server applies to.

items.description: Domains that the mcp server applies to.

McpServerDBConfig.description: Database config. For DB type server, it is required

enabled.description: Whether to enable the proxy next upstream feature.

attempts.description: Specifies the number of attempts to pass a request to the next server.

timeout.description: Specifies the timeout for passing a request to the next server.

conditions.description: Specifies in which cases a request should be passed to the next server.

items.description: Specifies in which cases a request should be passed to the next server.

version.description: Proxy server version. Required when updating.

serverAddress.description: Proxy server address, can be IP or domain name

connectTimeout.description: Proxy server connect timeout in milliseconds, default is 1200

domains.description: Domains that the route applies to. If empty, the route applies to all domains.

items.description: Domains that the route applies to. If empty, the route applies to all domains.

methods.description: Methods that the route applies to. If empty, the route applies to all methods.

items.description: Methods that the route applies to. If empty, the route applies to all methods.

caseSensitive.description: Whether to match the value case-sensitively

version.description: Service source version. Required when updating.

domain.description: Service source domain(s). For static type, use ip:port format. For dns type, use domain list.

port.description: Service source port. Always use 80 for static type.

protocol.description: Service source protocol. Used in static and dns types.

sni.description: Service source SNI. Used in static and dns types when TLS is enabled.

proxyName.description: Proxy server name. Only supported in static and dns types.

additionalProperties.description:
Service source extra properties, depending on the type.
For nacos/nacos2/nacos3: nacosGroups, nacosNamespaceId
For MCP supported types (e.g. nacos3): enableMCPServer, mcpServerBaseUrl, mcpServerExportDomains
For consul: consulDatacenter, consulServiceTag, consulRefreshInterval
For zookeeper: zkServicesPath

properties.description:
Service source extra properties, depending on the type.
For nacos/nacos2/nacos3: nacosGroups, nacosNamespaceId
For MCP supported types (e.g. nacos3): enableMCPServer, mcpServerBaseUrl, mcpServerExportDomains
For consul: consulDatacenter, consulServiceTag, consulRefreshInterval
For zookeeper: zkServicesPath

enabled.description: Enable authentication when accessing the service source

additionalProperties.description:
Authentication properties, depending on the type.
For nacos/nacos2: nacosUsername, nacosPassword
For consul: consulToken

properties.description:
Authentication properties, depending on the type.
For nacos/nacos2: nacosUsername, nacosPassword
For consul: consulToken

key.description: Private key content in PEM format

domains.description: Domains (SAN inluded) that the certificate applies to

items.description: Domains (SAN inluded) that the certificate applies to

VPort.description: Register vport configuration with default and service-specific values. Optional.

version.description: Plugin resource version. Required when updating.

priority.description: Plugin execution priority in the given phase

version.description: Plugin instance version. Required when updating.

internal.description: Whether this is an internal plugin instance managed by the console itself

enabled.description: Whether this plugin instance is enabled
